name: Genuine Logo Design Enquiry
description: A verified buyer with 48 reviews discusses a legitimate logo redesign project on-platform with a clear budget and professional tone

conversation.speaker: buyer
conversation.message: Hi! I came across your profile and I am really impressed by your portfolio. I run a small artisan bakery and I am looking for a logo redesign that reflects warmth and craftsmanship.

conversation.speaker: seller
conversation.message: Thank you! I would love to help with that. Could you tell me a bit more about your brand style and any existing colours or fonts you want to keep?

conversation.speaker: buyer
conversation.message: Sure. My budget is around $150 to $200. I will send you the brand brief through the Fiverr message thread. I prefer to keep everything on the platform.

conversation.speaker: seller
conversation.message: Perfect. I will review the brief and send you a custom offer. Looking forward to working with you.
